name: paperbox
tagline: Upload HTML games, apps & generative art to PaperBox and get a shareable link
description: Enables OpenClaw agents to instantly publish self-contained HTML games, apps, and generative art to PaperBox — a community gallery for AI-created web experiences. After the agent builds an HTML project (game, app, or art), this skill uploads it via the PaperBox API and returns a live URL the user can click to view and share.

credentials.label: PaperBox API Key
credentials.description: Log in at https://paperbox-beta.vercel.app/login (create a profile if needed), then go to Profile settings to generate your API key.
